Who am I

Hello! I am Laiba Batool

content:
// File: about.html (lines 122-129)

Passionate Computer Science student with a love for creating innovative solutions and exploring the endless possibilities of technology.

// File: about.html (lines 130-152)

I’m Laiba, a Computer Science student at PIEAS (Batch 2023–2027), currently in my 5th semester. My tech journey started with curiosity about how things work and has grown into a passion for web development and AI. I love experimenting with new tools and turning ideas into real-world projects.

Beyond coding, I’m actively involved as a Designer for the AWS Cloud Club at PIEAS, where I contribute to tech-driven creativity and community initiatives. In my free time, you’ll find me exploring the latest tech trends, working on side projects, or leveling up my skills.
